transcript: Calling all units, A211 at 675 Main, backup needed Look, tell a man no trouble, I don't want beef, man, I just want vibes Big man like me, no need for the telephone hype I got too much getting online, one rule, then let him on site Wrong move, I bet they gon' ride, no need for the telephone hype Nah, no need for the snoozing, big whip outside, I'm cruising, big stick inside, no losing, better watch out for the snake and Judas's, don't ask them who this is. Be advised, suspect is armed and extremely dangerous. This is the police, we have you surrounded. Lay down your weapon. Come out with your hands up! Hello? Hello, Bernard. This is Captain Giles on the 34th Precinct. Quite a predicament we have here. Yeah, quite. Well, before this goes any further and gets messier than it has to, I have someone I would like to speak to. Bernard, Bernard what the fuck are you doing? Where's he at? He's safe. Driver, step out of the vehicle. And you let those cops know! They'll make one move! I'll shoot myself, and they'll never find him! Alive, at least! You're out of your fucking mind if you want to fuck your life over. Fine. But he's just an innocent child. Don't you fucking blame me! It's not my fault! All I wanted to do was see my son, and you made this impossible! If I can't see him, then nobody can! What is it now, Tiffany? What? Bernard, I just need you to listen to me for a second. Can you do that? Can you just hear me out? Have you stopped taking your meds? We don't have a son, Bernard. Gryffindor  veve So until next time, bye for now!
